metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Nutrition domain, linking formulation, production, quality, supplier collaboration, and analytics to the underlying product bricks.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience now carries only experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

capabilities.name: Trust Core Product Data
capabilities.description: Help formulators work from trusted ingredient, nutrient, and specification data.

flows.title: Trust Core Product Data
flows.description: Help formulators work from trusted ingredient, nutrient, and specification data.

steps.title: Open ingredient record
keyFacts: Open ingredient record is a meaningful step in the formulation user experience flow.
Users need clear guidance and feedback here to keep moving forward.
painPoints: Users drop out when open ingredient record feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.
